'''âf-g-n''' ('''kafagan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhubarb|rhubarb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhubarb|rhubarb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-g-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafagan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifagan|thifagan]] || [[word:jifagan|jifagan]] || [[word:shifagan|shifagan]] || [[word:kifagan|kifagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufagan|thuthufagan]] || [[word:jujufagan|jujufagan]] || [[word:shushufagan|shushufagan]] || [[word:kukufagan|kukufagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufagan|thufagan]] || [[word:jufagan|jufagan]] || [[word:shufagan|shufagan]] || [[word:kufagan|kufagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufagan|thufagan]] || [[word:jufagan|jufagan]] || [[word:shufagan|shufagan]] || [[word:kufagan|kufagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefagan|thefagan]] || [[word:jefagan|jefagan]] || [[word:shefagan|shefagan]] || [[word:kefagan|kefagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofagan|thothofagan]] || [[word:jojofagan|jojofagan]] || [[word:shoshofagan|shoshofagan]] || [[word:kokofagan|kokofagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofagan|thofagan]] || [[word:jofagan|jofagan]] || [[word:shofagan|shofagan]] || [[word:kofagan|kofagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofagan|thofagan]] || [[word:jofagan|jofagan]] || [[word:shofagan|shofagan]] || [[word:kofagan|kofagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfagan|thĂŠfagan]] || [[word:jĂŠfagan|jĂŠfagan]] || [[word:shĂŠfagan|shĂŠfagan]] || [[word:kĂŠfagan|kĂŠfagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafagan|thathafagan]] || [[word:jajafagan|jajafagan]] || [[word:shashafagan|shashafagan]] || [[word:kakafagan|kakafagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafagan|thafagan]] || [[word:jafagan|jafagan]] || [[word:shafagan|shafagan]] || [[word:kafagan|kafagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafagan|thafagan]] || [[word:jafagan|jafagan]] || [[word:shafagan|shafagan]] || [[word:kafagan|kafagan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafagan|shafagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafagan|goshafagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafagan|gokishafagan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafaganĂŒ|shafaganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafaganknĂŒ|goshafaganknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafaganĂŒ|gokishafaganĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafaganshĂ«|shafaganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafagankshĂ«|goshafagankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafaganshĂ«|gokishafaganshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafaganro|shafaganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagankro|goshafagankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafaganro|gokishafaganro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafaganmu|shafaganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagankmu|goshafagankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafaganmu|gokishafaganmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafagansher|shafagansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafaganksher|goshafaganksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafagansher|gokishafagansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafagang|shafagang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafagankng|goshafagankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafagang|gokishafagang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafaganya|shafaganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafagankya|goshafagankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafaganya|gokishafaganya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafaganyam|shafaganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafagankyam|goshafagankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafaganyam|gokishafaganyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafaganĂŒshĂ«|shafaganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafaganknĂŒshĂ«|goshafaganknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafaganĂŒshĂ«|gokishafaganĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafaganĂŒro|shafaganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafaganknĂŒro|goshafaganknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafaganĂŒro|gokishafaganĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafaganĂŒmu|shafaganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafaganknĂŒmu|goshafaganknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafaganĂŒmu|gokishafaganĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafaganshĂ«nĂŒ|shafaganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafagankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafaganshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafaganshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafaganshĂ«ro|shafaganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagankshĂ«ro|goshafagankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafaganshĂ«ro|gokishafaganshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafaganshĂ«mu|shafaganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagankshĂ«mu|goshafagankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafaganshĂ«mu|gokishafaganshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafaganronĂŒ|shafaganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagankronĂŒ|goshafagankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafaganronĂŒ|gokishafaganronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafaganroshĂ«|shafaganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafagankroshĂ«|goshafagankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafaganroshĂ«|gokishafaganroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafaganromu|shafaganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafagankromu|goshafagankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafaganromu|gokishafaganromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafaganmunĂŒ|shafaganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafagankmunĂŒ|goshafagankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafaganmunĂŒ|gokishafaganmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafaganmushĂ«|shafaganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafagankmushĂ«|goshafagankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafaganmushĂ«|gokishafaganmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafaganmuro|shafaganmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafagankmuro|goshafagankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafaganmuro|gokishafaganmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
